name: Quality of Life
author: neostryder (RPGM Tools)
description: Bundled, default-on, fully-removable quality-of-life mod. It adds NEW conveniences that are not part of faithful Angband (the built-in Angband options ship in core with their upstream defaults and are NOT touched here). Every tweak is a named, described toggle in the in-app Fixes & tweaks menu; QoL tweaks are ON by default. See docs/modding/QOL.md.

rules.title: Auto-dig on walk
rules.description: Walking into a rubble pile or mineral vein you can tunnel through starts digging automatically, instead of just bumping into it. You still stop after each attempt and never step onto the dug-out square in the same move.
